title: Leading Through the Noise: Making AI Stick in Engineering Teams
description: AI is evolving faster than engineering organisations can comfortably track, leaving leaders to cut through constant noise and hype. This talk focuses on how engineering leaders can drive real AI adoption through culture, experimentation and clear decision-making.

title: Nimble Scaling: LHV Bank accelerates value flow through Team Topologies
description: Hands-on workshops on restructuring engineering organisations for flow, alignment and sustainable delivery.

title: AI, Data & Automation: Redefining the Customer Experience
description: Session on how AI, data and automation are transforming customer experience in financial services, representing LHV Bank at Open Banking Expo 2025.

title: What Regulated Engineering Teaches You About Trust
description: A conversation on building software where the cost of being wrong is measured in more than downtime, and why constraints can make better engineers.
